name: tiger-skills
description: Code quality and harness engineering skills for Claude Code. code-quality enforces design principles, Pydantic types, and clean code. harness-engineering manages agent workflow: AGENTS.md, session discipline, verification pipeline, and spec-before-code.
author: arkadaz

skills.name: code-quality
skills.description: Enforce code quality when writing, reviewing, or auditing code. Covers design principles (SRP, OCP, LSP, DRY, etc.), Pydantic types, logging, enums, and clean code rules.

skills.name: harness-engineering
skills.description: Build and maintain the harness around AI coding agents — AGENTS.md, PROGRESS.md, session discipline, WIP=1, three-layer verification, spec-before-code, and Git discipline.
